sections.name: Cybersecurity Education
sections.description: A secure cloud service provider will educate their employees on cybersecurity measures, testing them persistently to ensure their knowledge is satisfactory.

sections.name: Change Management
sections.description: A secure cloud service provider will ensure that all changes are properly documented and configuration baselines are updated accordingly.

sections.name: Cloud Native Architecture
sections.description: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the confidentiality, integrity and availability of the system.

sections.name: Identity and Access Management
sections.description: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.

sections.name: Incident Response
sections.description: A secure cloud service offering will document, report, and analyze security incidents to ensure regulatory compliance and continuous security improvement.

sections.name: Monitoring, Logging, and Auditing
sections.description: A secure cloud service offering will monitor, log, and audit all important events, activity, and changes.

sections.name: Policy and Inventory
sections.description: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.

sections.name: Recovery Planning
sections.description: A secure cloud service offering will define, maintain, and test incident response plan(s) and recovery capabilities to ensure minimal service disruption and data loss during incidents and contingencies.

sections.name: Service Configuration
sections.description: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.

sections.name: Third-Party Information Resources
sections.description: A secure cloud service offering will understand, monitor, and manage supply chain risks from third-party information resources.

sections.name: Key Security Indicators 20X Provider Responsibiliites
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings following the 20x path.

sections.name: Minimum Assessment Scope General Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings following the Minimum Assessment Scope process.

sections.name: Authorization Data Sharing 20x-Specific Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to ALL cloud service offerings following the FedRAMP 20x path.

sections.name: Authorization Data Sharing General Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to ALL cloud service offerings for FedRAMP Certification or Validation.

sections.name: Authorization Data Sharing FedRAMP-Compatible Trust Centers
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to trust centers that are FedRAMP-compatible.

sections.name: Authorization Data Share Using a Trust Center
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations cloud services that are using a FedRAMP-compatible trust center instead of USDA Connect; they DO NOT apply to cloud services using USDA Connect.

sections.name: Using Cryptographic Modules 20x-Specific Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings following the 20x path.

sections.name: Vulnerability Detection and Response General Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings following the Vulnerability Detection and Response process

sections.name: Vulnerability Detection and Response Evaluation
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to the evaluation of vulnerabilities.

sections.name: Vulnerability Detection and Response Best Practices
sections.description: These recommendations for best practices apply to all cloud service providers.

sections.name: Vulnerability Detection and Response Timeframes
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to timeframes for vulnerability detection and response.

sections.name: Vulnerability Detection and Response Reporting
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to reporting related to vulnerability detection and response.

sections.name: Vulnerability Detection and Response Agency Guidance
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations for agencies apply to all agencies reusing a FedRAMP Certification or Validation for a cloud service offering following the Vulnerability Detection and Response process.

sections.name: Significant Change Notifications General Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings following the Significant Change Notification process.

sections.name: Significant Change Notifications Routine Recurring Changes
sections.description: These requirements and recommends apply to all routine recurring significant changes.

sections.name: Significant Change Notifications Adaptive Changes
sections.description: These requirements and recommends apply to all adaptive significant changes.

sections.name: Significant Change Notifications Transformative Changes
sections.description: These requirements and recommends apply to all transformative significant changes.

sections.name: Persistent Validation and Assessment 20x-Specific Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings following the 20x path.

sections.name: Secure Configuration Guide General Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings in the FedRAMP Marketplace.

sections.name: Secure Configuration Guide Enhanced Capabilities
sections.description: These recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings in the FedRAMP Marketplace for enhanced capabilities related to the Secure Configuration Guide.

sections.name: Collaborative Continuous Monitoring Ongoing Authorization Reports
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations for Ongoing Authorization Reports apply to all cloud service offerings following the CCM process.

sections.name: Collaborative Continuous Monitoring Quarterly Reviews
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations for Quarterly Reviews apply to all cloud service offerings following the CCM process.

sections.name: Collaborative Continuous Monitoring Agency Guidance
sections.description: These requirements and recommends for agencies apply to all agencies reusing a FedRAMP Certification or Validation for a cloud service offering following the CCM process.

sections.name: FedRAMP Security Inbox General Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings in the FedRAMP Marketplace.

sections.name: Incident Communications Procedures 20x-Specific Provider Responsibilities
sections.description: These requirements and recommendations apply to all cloud service offerings following the 20x path.
